title: sterculia bammleri
intro: Sterculia bammleri, also known as the Indian copal tree, is a species of plant in the family Sterculiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of infections. The health benefits of Sterculia bammleri include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Sterculia bammleri is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, where it is made into a tea or a powder that can be added to food or drinks.
